privileged_info_summary: The task involves registering three synthetic patients from the MOREAU family in MedinTux medical software. All three patients (Pierre, Catherine, Emma) are registered at the same address in Toulouse (31000 postal code). All French social security numbers (SSNs) follow the valid French 15-digit format with correct sex indicators, birth years, months, and Haute-Garonne department codes (31). Birth dates are valid and ages are plausible (father ~51 years old born 1975, mother ~48 years old born 1978, daughter ~14 years old born 2012). This is clearly synthetic test data running in the DrTuxTest database for testing MedinTux patient registration workflows, not real patient information.
